creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port with respect to GP by which printing out
	interactively with GUI interface. 

	I put the port packed with 'tar czf' on to

	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/port-jp-GP-2.01jp.tar.gz

	Packed tarball is

		2961 Apr 15 22:11 jp-GP-2.01jp.tar.gz

	Packed list is

		   0 Apr 15 21:54 1997 GP/files/
		  58 Apr 15 21:37 1997 GP/files/md5
		 574 Apr 14 15:41 1997 GP/files/pr-setup.sh
		 913 Apr 14 15:39 1997 GP/files/printer.tmpl
		1760 Apr 15 21:50 1997 GP/files/patch-GP
		 798 Apr 14 15:35 1997 GP/files/filetype.tmpl
		   0 Apr 15 21:54 1997 GP/patches/
		   0 Apr 15 19:54 1997 GP/pkg/
		  48 Mar 30 20:35 1997 GP/pkg/COMMENT
		 134 Apr  6 10:25 1997 GP/pkg/PLIST
		 554 Apr 15 19:54 1997 GP/pkg/DESCR
		1261 Apr 15 21:45 1997 GP/Makefile
